Norge WASHER-6697L03

Norge WASHER-8698E02

Norge WASHER-8934L02

Norge WASHER-1217E08

Norge WASHER-5236L01

Lock Error

Open Circuit

Norge WASHER-9952F08

About Norge Error Codes

Norge is a leading manufacturer of appliances and industrial equipment. When your Norge appliance shows an error code, it indicates a specific issue that needs attention. Our comprehensive database includes error codes for all Norge product categories including washers, dryers, refrigerators, dishwashers, HVAC systems, and more.

Each error code page provides detailed troubleshooting steps, common causes, and recommended solutions to help you fix the issue quickly.
